entries.title: Normal Enemy
entries.description: Your basic enemy. Rolls straight toward your goal with no tricks. Easy to knock around, but dangerous in numbers.

entries.title: Aggressive Enemy
entries.description: Charges toward your goal like a normal enemy, but if you get too close it'll ram you. Keep your distance or hit it from the side.
entries.stats:
Speed: 5
Mass: 2
Ram Force: 25
Detect Radius: 30

entries.title: Evasive Enemy
entries.description: Zigzags sideways while advancing toward your goal, making it harder to line up a clean hit. Time your boost to catch it mid-dodge.

entries.title: Tank Enemy
entries.description: Twice the size, triple the mass, half the speed. Slow but extremely hard to push. You'll need a powerup or a running start to move this thing.

entries.title: Knockback
entries.description: Supercharges your bump force for a limited time. Enemies go flying on contact. Picking up another one extends the timer.

entries.title: Smash
entries.description: Launch into the air, aim at a target in slow-mo, then dive-bomb the ground for a massive AOE shockwave. Each pickup gives one charge (press F to use).
entries.stats:
Charges: 1 per pickup
AOE with distance falloff

entries.title: Shield
entries.description: Creates a protective sphere around you that destroys enemies on contact. Each shield absorbs 3 hits before breaking. Extra pickups add stacks.
entries.stats:
Hits per stack: 3
Stacking: adds shield layers

entries.title: Giant
entries.description: Grow to twice your size and flatten enemies by rolling over them. Squished enemies count as scored. Shrinks back after the timer runs out.

entries.title: Haunt
entries.description: For a limited time, any enemy you touch gets haunted, reverse their direction and aggressively roll toward their own goal. Haunted enemies spread the curse to others on contact.
entries.stats:
Buff duration: 8s
Enemy effect: 5s
Stacking: extends timer
Spreads on contact

entries.title: Grasslands
entries.description: Rolling green hills with wide open space. The classic arena, just you, the enemies, and the beautiful green grass.

entries.title: Desert
entries.description: Sun-scorched sand dunes and rocky terrain. Watch your footing (high friction).

entries.title: Snow
entries.description: Frozen tundra with icy patches. The cold never bothered the enemies, but it might bother you (low friction).

entries.title: Space
entries.description: Zero-gravity arena, where you and the enemies float freely. Momentum is everything here.
